lettuce_sync.signature: Long geosearchstore(K destination, K key, GeoSearch.GeoRef<K> reference, GeoSearch.GeoPredicate predicate, GeoArgs geoArgs boolean storeDist)

params.name: destination
params.description: the destination where to store results.

params.name: key
params.description: the key of the geo set.

params.name: reference
params.description: the reference member or longitude/latitude coordinates.

params.name: predicate
params.description: the bounding box or radius to search in.

params.name: storeDist
params.description: a floating-point number, in the same unit specified for that shape.

returns.description: Long integer-reply the number of elements in the result. @since 6.1

nredisstack_sync.signature: GeoSearchAndStore(RedisKey sourceKey, RedisKey destinationKey, RedisValue member, GeoSearchShape shape, int count = -1, bool demandClosest = true, Order? order = null, bool storeDistances = false, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: sourceKey
params.description: The key of the set.

params.name: destinationKey
params.description: .</returns> <remarks></remarks>

params.name: shape
params.description: The shape to use to bound the geo search.

params.name: count
params.description: The maximum number of results to pull back.

params.name: demandClosest
params.description: Whether to terminate the search after finding count results. Must be true of count is -1.

params.name: order
params.description: The order to sort by (defaults to unordered).

params.name: storeDistances
params.description: If set to true, the resulting set will be a regular sorted-set containing only distances, rather than a geo-encoded sorted-set.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags for this operation.
